title: rhacoma puberula
intro: Rhacoma puberula, also known as the Himalayan Rhacoma or Himalayan Wormwood, is a type of shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rhacoma puberula include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Rhacoma puberula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
